title: Translating custom field values within monday.com for different language users

posts.author: jacklam (Jack Lam)
posts.cookedHtml:
For users with different language requirements, custom board names/fields right now can only be shown iņ one value regardless of interface language chosen.

I would like monday.com to be able to have this feature where we can specify the default value and language specific values for custom/renamed boards and fields to better suit teams with multi-lingual and cultural backgrounds.
